title: Filipino Lentil Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful Filipino-inspired stew made with red lentils, perfect for a comforting meal.

ingredients.name: cheese
ingredients.notes: optional (can be omitted for vegan option)

instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add onion, garlic, and ginger; cook until the onion is translucent.
Add tomato paste and cook for 1 minute.
Add lentils, vegetable broth, and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 20-25 minutes or until the lentils are tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot and garnish with green onions, if desired.
If using cheese, top with shredded cheese and serve.
